title: Sacrifice (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Sacrifice''''' has been used as the title for multiple ''Star Wars'' works:

*'''''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''''', the fifth novel of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series
*'''''[[Empire 7|Empire: Sacrifice]]''''', a story featuring [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], and the seventh issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'' comic series
*'''''[[Republic 49|Republic: Sacrifice]]''''', the forty-ninth issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' comic series
*"'''[[Sacrifice (episode)|Sacrifice]]'''," the [[The Clone Wars: The Lost Missions|sixth season]] finale of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' television series
*"'''[[Sacrifice (cinematic trailer)|Sacrifice]]'''," a cinematic trailer for ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Fallen Empire]]''
*'''[[Sacrifice (article)|''Sacrifice'']]''', an article in [[Star Wars Insider 93|''Star Wars Insider'' 93]]
